form.formComment: Won two starts back over 401m at this track. Last start he finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 400m at Maitland behind Super Storm beaten 6 lengths (22.88). Draw likely to suit. Unbeaten in four starts from this box. Key runner.
